title: pyrus dolichofoliolata
intro: Pyrus dolichofoliolata is a species of plant, also known as the Long-leaf pear or Chinese pear tree, belonging to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus dolichofoliolata include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Pyrus dolichofoliolata include decoctions, infusions, and dried extracts, often used to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for therapeutic purposes.
